title: astracantha rumelica subsp. taygetica
intro: Astracantha rumelica subsp. taygetica, also known as Spiny Broom or Taygetean Astracantha, is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Astracantha rumelica subsp. taygetica include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of using this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, reduce fever, and treat skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Astracantha rumelica subsp. taygetica is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
